title: No Ender Chests
description: This mod disables the use of Ender Chests. Players can still place them, but right-clicking will show a message in the action bar saying Ender Chests are disabled.
body:
## NECH ("No Ender Chests")

This mod disables the use of Ender Chests. Players can still place them, but right-clicking will show a message in the action bar saying Ender Chests are disabled.
